warnings: Responders should prioritize incident-specific selectors and evidence requirements over any shared workflow language.
Keep the causal wording precise: the actor abused legitimate SysAid deployment functionality after access; available evidence does not establish a malicious SysAid update or vendor compromise.
evidence: The draft and analysis preserve operational detail, numbered source attribution, uncertainty labels, and an explicit Sources section.
The prose distinguishes confirmed observations from inference and does not turn legitimate vendor or reporting infrastructure into attacker IOCs.
